column1: DURING THE GAME: Click at the top of the screen or press ESC to use the menus. Additional shortcuts are shown there. Click Right or Shift-Click Left Mouse Button on an object to look at it.       IN TYPING WINDOWS: Arrows, Home and End move the cursor, or click anywhere with the mouse. Ctrl-C clears the line.       IN DIALOG WINDOWS: Select the outlined item with <Enter> and use Tab and Shift-Tab to move between  choices.  Or click with the mouse to select an item.  ESC always cancels.
column2: DURING THE GAME: Click at the top of the screen or press ESC to use the menus. Additional shortcuts are shown there. IN DIALOG WINDOWS: Select the outlined item with <Enter> and use Tab and Shift-Tab to move between  choices.  Or click with the mouse to select an item.  ESC always cancels.
